summary: Completed comprehensive testing of F&B Financial Control Platform ERP system. Backend APIs fully functional (19/19 tests passed). Frontend core functionality working with minor navigation issues in management portal.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation to Finance page times out after clicking Finance menu item
Navigation to Outlet Dashboard times out after selecting outlet portal

design_issues.issue: Console warning about missing key props in ManagementLayout component

passed_tests: Portal selector displays 5 portals (2 active + 3 coming soon)
Management portal dashboard loads with KPIs and charts
Coming Soon portals show badges and prevent navigation
Outlet scoping works (manager.sudirman sees only outlet portal)
Reports APIs (P&L, cashflow, balance sheet, inventory valuation)
Admin, Approvals, Audit Trail page loading
Create account and movement dialog opening
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix navigation timeouts in Management portal (Finance page) and Outlet portal (Dashboard page). Investigate routing or component loading issues causing navigation delays.
